description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Starting in fiscal year 2026 (Reiwa 8), Tove Jansson Akebono Children's Forest Park will change its operating schedule.

【Changes to Opening Days】
Opening days will be adjusted on a trial basis depending on seasonal usage patterns.

Busy season (April–May, mid-September–December, late March): Open Tuesday–Sunday, closed every Monday (or the following weekday if Monday is a holiday)

Quiet season (June–early September, January–mid-March): Open Thursday–Sunday, closed every Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday (holidays observed with compensatory opening days)

Year-end and New Year (December 28–January 4): Closed as usual

【Changes to Opening Hours】
Evening lighting after sunset on Saturdays, Sundays, and holidays will be suspended as of March 29, 2026 (Sunday). All opening days will now close at 5:00 PM.

For a detailed opening day and hour calendar, please check the Hanno City website opening calendar.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/akebono/oshirase/13104.html
summary: ℹ️ Changes to opening days and hours at Tove Jansson Akebono Children's Forest Park (trial program)
